summary: Video narration feature testing completed successfully. All 8 backend API tests passed. Frontend video tutorials page fully functional with correct Chinese button text '生成语音解说教程' (Generate Voice Tutorial). Video player dialog and edit dialog both working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing DialogTitle and Description accessibility attributes - minor a11y issue, not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: Video CRUD APIs (GET, PUT, DELETE, POST upload) all working correctly
POST /api/videos/generate-tutorials endpoint returns success with Chinese message about voice narration
Generate endpoint correctly requires admin authentication (returns 401/403 for unauthenticated users)
Narration scripts properly configured for 7 tutorials with Chinese text segments
Frontend VideoGenerator component shows correct button text '生成语音解说教程'
Video player dialog plays videos with autoplay and controls
Edit dialog allows updating video title and category

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, video page, video player, edit dialog all verified)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing videos from previous generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice narration video feature verified. All video CRUD endpoints work. Frontend shows 7 tutorial videos. The generate-tutorials endpoint triggers background TTS+Playwright+ffmpeg process (takes 3-5 mins). Button text correctly shows '生成语音解说教程'. Video player and edit dialogs functional.

backend_apis: GET /api/videos - Returns list of 7 tutorial videos
POST /api/videos/generate-tutorials - Triggers background narrated video generation (admin only)
DELETE /api/videos/{video_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent video (correct behavior)
Narration scripts properly structured with Chinese text for all 7 tutorials
frontend_pages: Login page - Admin credentials work, redirects to dashboard
Video tutorials page (/admin/video-tutorials) - Displays 7 videos with correct UI
Generate button shows '生成语音解说教程' (correct Chinese text for voice narration)
Start recording button shows '开始录屏'
Video player dialog - Opens on click, plays video with controls
Edit video dialog - Opens with title input and category dropdown, works correctly
